---
title: "The Rev. Michael Rosenthal"
---

## The Rev. Michael Rosenthal

**Dates:** (b. Wilma, Russia 1843/4)

### Description

curate of St. Paul’s, Haggerston

### Biography

A convert from Judaism, he was made deacon 1877, priest 1881, curate of St. Paul's Haggerston in 1877; he was a widower by 1891) [<i>Clergy List</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Easter Eve [?31 March 1888]
- Letter from Sept 28th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
